mapper.insert: insert into clazz(name , room , begin_date , end_date , master_id , subject, create_time , update_time) value (#{name},#{room},#{beginDate},#{endDate},#{masterId},#{subject},#{createTime},#{updateTime});
mapper.select: select id, name, room, begin_date, end_date, master_id, subject, create_time, update_time from clazz where id = #{id};
select id, name, room, begin_date, end_date, master_id, subject, create_time, update_time from clazz;
SELECT c.name AS clazz, COUNT(s.id) AS num FROM clazz c LEFT JOIN student s ON s.clazz_id = c.id GROUP BY c.id,c.name ORDER BY num desc;
